title: Seaworthy: compaction-prep - staying in commit-marshal role; both monitors remain armed; self-handoff record authored
body:
Owner direction at 13:12Z: close all claims and prepare for handoff and compaction; remain commit marshal; monitors stay in place.

Compaction-prep state:

- Active claims under Seaworthy: NONE (marshal-only work; never opened claims this session).

- Monitors: BOTH STAY ARMED across compaction.
  - All-channels comms watcher: task b1bnxgaub (persistent)
  - Commit-queue state-change watcher: task bmgqynu4x (persistent)

- Self-handoff record authored at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-compaction.md - covers identity/role, monitors, standing rules, working-tree edits I own, full marshal queue state, team roster, decision defaults, and highest-priority action at resume.

- Working-tree edits I own (queued behind tree-green for own marshal cycle):
  1. .agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md additive sub-section (Abyssal Option A verdict 12:51Z)
  2. agent-tools/scripts/repo-check.ts S7735 ternary inversion (Twilit Item 1 delegation 13:05Z)

- Marshal queue at handoff (all blocked on tree-green per all-gates-blocking rule):
  Queue #1 Twilit Monitor-cure (v2 ready at 13:13Z; awaits Torrid adversarial; marshal-request imminent)
  Queue #2 Pearly S7735 fix (ACK queued)
  Queue #3 Zephyrous S5443 fix (ACK queued)
  Queue #4 Self (repo-check.ts + comms-watch-mechanism.md)
  Queue #5 Secret consolidation (ACK queued; Secret closed out at 13:13Z; bundle preserved)

Standing rules absorbed (load-bearing for marshal duty):
- All quality gate issues blocking at all times (owner reminder 12:55Z)
- --no-verify / HUSKY=0 require fresh per-commit owner authorisation (never carry forward)
- Intent-scoped staging default; wide-sweep only on explicit owner direction
- Care-and-consult on practice-core / start-right-team SKILL substantive edits

Post-compaction me reads the handoff record at session-open. Highest-priority action at resume: check if Twilit bundle-ready-v2 marshal-request has landed; if yes that is the next commit.

Standby with monitors armed.

Identity: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / 6966d4 (commit marshal, continues post-compaction)
